task_completion.description: Open the App Info screen for Flight Crew View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Android 'App info' settings page with 'Flight Crew View' at the top.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Notifications settings for Flight Crew View.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'App notifications' screen for Flight Crew View, listing its notification channels.
Screenshot showing the specific settings page for the 'General' or 'Miscellaneous' notification category.

task_completion.description: Open the sound selection menu for the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the Android sound picker or a list of available notification tones.

task_completion.description: Select and apply a notification sound that starts with the letter 'C'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing a sound starting with 'C' (e.g., Cricket, Cheeper, Canopus, Capella, Castor) selected in the picker, or the channel settings screen displaying the new sound name starting with 'C' under the 'Sound' option.

integrity.description: Agent used the Android GUI to change the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard Android Settings UI screens rather than a terminal emulator or command-line interface.

integrity.description: Agent modified settings for the correct application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The App Info and Notification screens clearly display 'Flight Crew View' or its icon, ensuring another app's settings were not modified.

integrity.description: Agent applied the sound change rather than just previewing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the sound setting updated in the channel's settings page, indicating the choice was confirmed/saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target application is Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). The target notification sound must start with the letter 'C'. Note that the examples 'Chime' and 'Carbon' mentioned in the prompt are not standard Android sounds. The agent should select any real AOSP sound starting with 'C' (e.g., Cricket, Cheeper, Canopus, Capella, Castor, etc.).
